name: Sopa De Mani (Peanut Soup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a saucepan.
2. Cook the onion until it becomes transparent.
3. Add the ground peanuts or peanut butter, potatoes, and about 1 cup of stock to the pan. Mash everything together well.
4. Alternatively, place all ingredients into a blender and process until smooth.
5. Slowly pour in the remaining stock while continuing to mix.
6. Bring the soup to a boil, then reduce heat and let it simmer, covered, for 5-10 minutes.
7. Remove from heat and season with salt and pepper.
8. Sprinkle chives on top before serving.
